Title: Ghost
Trauma_Text: My house was always quiet, my parents lost inside glowing screens.
Quote: Someone like me can disappear in the real world and build a thousand lives online.
Prompt_1_Abyss: When did you first feel unseen
Prompt_2_Awaken: Where do you go when reality feels empty
Prompt_3_Scar: What hidden world lives inside you

Title: Medal Hunter
Trauma_Text: Love arrived with scores and trophies, and I learned to chase it endlessly.
Quote: Someone like me learns that love is never given, only earned again and again.
Prompt_1_Abyss: When did love start to feel conditional
Prompt_2_Awaken: Whose approval are you still chasing
Prompt_3_Scar: What would success mean on your own terms

Title: Marionette
Trauma_Text: My life was carefully arranged before I could choose it.
